business_problem: Travel buyers were stuck with a 30-year-old 'tyranny of the five boxes' search paradigm while content sat scattered across many sources, and travel sellers (e.g. airlines) were absorbing tens of millions of customer emails a year for routine booking changes — both pressing Sabre to deliver more personalized travel commerce and free up customer-care agents for higher-value work.
solution_summary: Sabre launched SabreMosaic, an AI-powered travel commerce platform underpinned by Sabre IQ, an intelligence layer built on Gemini models and Vertex AI. The platform processes 50+ petabytes of anonymized travel data to deliver personalized offers, ancillary upsells (10% revenue lift), seat upgrade optimization (20% revenue lift), and real-time market forecasting. SabreMosaic Concierge IQ, built using Vertex AI Agent Builder, deploys conversational agents that handle multi-leg trip planning, rebooking, hotel arrival management, and expense filing in one seamless chat interface. Google Maps Platform provides location services, and the Travel Impact Model API enables carbon footprint display for sustainable travel options.
business_outcome: Sabre is monetizing personalization for airlines, accelerating customer-care productivity, and shipping new agentic experiences on a modular API-based platform while running on a far cheaper and more resilient cloud foundation.
metrics: Up to 10% higher airline ancillary revenue via SabreMosaic Ancillary IQ
Up to 20% higher seat upgrade revenue via SabreMosaic Upgrade IQ
High single-digit productivity gains in customer-care operations from generative AI solutions
Up to 7% better market forecasting via Sabre Market Intelligence
$150M in annualized cost savings from cloud infrastructure modernization
More than 40,000 servers moved to the cloud
architecture_clues: Sabre IQ intelligence layer combining strong privacy controls, security and a governance framework on top of Google Cloud AI
SabreMosaic is a modular, open, API-based platform with selectable modules (Ancillary IQ, Upgrade IQ, Concierge IQ, Sabre Market Intelligence)
Concierge IQ agentic chat built on Vertex AI Agent Builder, latest Gemini models, Google Maps Platform, and SabreMosaic APIs
Semantic search on Vertex AI plus Gemini models underpin generative travel experiences
Real-time signal-based market forecasting via Sabre Market Intelligence rather than purely historical analysis
Sustainability data and flight carbon footprints exposed via the Google Travel Impact Model API
Automated AI agent testing and validation pipeline built with partner Egen, integrated into Sabre's existing dev workflow
evidence_quotes: 70 ongoing generative AI projects to improve travel experiences
Using AI to boost airline ancillary revenue up to 10% and seat upgrade revenue up to 20%
$150M in annualized cost savings through cloud infrastructure modernization
99% of compute capacity now cloud-based, unlocking AI-powered innovations

Sabre's latest development in this space is SabreMosaic™ Concierge IQ, an all-in-one generative AI chat solution for travelers built using Vertex AI Agent Builder, the latest Gemini models, Google Maps Platform, and SabreMosaic APIs.

solution_components.name: Gemini
solution_components.role: Powers the conversational intelligence core of SabreMosaic, processing traveler preferences and booking context to generate personalized offers and natural language responses.

solution_components.name: Vertex AI
solution_components.role: Provides the ML infrastructure and foundational models for SabreMosaic's ancillary revenue optimization, market forecasting, and price intelligence algorithms.

solution_components.name: Vertex AI Agent Builder
solution_components.role: Orchestrates multi-agent workflows for SabreMosaic Concierge IQ, coordinating flight rebooking, hotel management, and expense report tasks in conversational context.

solution_components.name: Google Maps Platform
solution_components.role: Enables location-based recommendations and ground transportation options integration into travel itineraries.

solution_components.name: Travel Impact Model API
solution_components.role: Provides carbon emissions data for flights and alternative transportation, allowing travelers to compare sustainability impact across booking options.

data_flow: Traveler search intent and booking history ingested into Vertex AI models trained on 50+ petabytes of travel data. Gemini processes natural language queries and preferences. Agents coordinate across booking systems, hotel APIs, expense systems, and maps to construct multi-leg itineraries. Carbon data fetched from Travel Impact Model API. Personalized ancillary and upgrade offers generated based on traveler profile. Responses returned conversationally via Concierge IQ interface.
